versions.version_description: Includes chords, intro and strumming pattern.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
I wanna start this out and say[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I gotta get it off my chest[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Got no anger, got no malice[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Just a little bit of regret[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Know nobody else will tell you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
So there's some things I gotta say[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Gonna jot it down and then get it out[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
And then I'll be on my way[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                              [ch]G[/ch]
No, you're not half the man you think that you are[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                              [ch]A[/ch]
And you can't fill the hole inside of you with money, drugs and cars[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
I'm so glad I never ever had a baby with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                                      [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause you can't love nothin' unless there's somethin' in it for you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, I feel so sorry[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I feel so sad[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
I tried to help you[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]A[/ch]
It just made you mad[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I had no warnin'[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
About who you are[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm just glad I made it out without breakin' down[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
And then ran so fuckin' far[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
That you would never ever touch me again[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
Won't see your alligator tears[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause, no, I've had enough of them[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Let me start this off by sayin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I really meant well from the start[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Take a broken man right in my hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
And then put back all his parts[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                             [ch]G[/ch]
But you're not half the man you think that you are[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
And you can't fill the hole inside of you with money, girls and cars[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
I'm so glad I never ever had a baby with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                                     [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause you can't love nothin' unless there's somethin' in it for you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, I feel so sorry (I feel so sorry)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I feel so sad (I feel so sad)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I tried to help you (I tried to help you)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
It just made you mad[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I had no warnin' (I had no warnin')[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
About who you are ('bout who you)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]
Just glad I made it out without breakin' down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, I feel so sorry (I feel so sorry)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I feel so sad (I feel so sad)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I tried to help you (I tried to help you)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
It just made you mad[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I had no warnin' (I had no)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
About who you are ('bout who you)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
'Bout who you are[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Hey[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause you're not half the man you think that you are[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]
And you can't fill the hole inside of you with money, drugs and cars[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I'm so glad I never ever had a baby with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                                    [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause you can't love nothin' unless there's somethin' in it for you[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I feel so sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You should be sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You should be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
You should be sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You should be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You should be[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You should be[/tab]
